programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story

programme.title: Challah Pigs in a Blanket & Challah Monkey Bread
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: Beer Batter Fish Fry

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover

programme.title: Sacred Send-Offs
programme.desc: Since the dawn of humanity, rituals have marked our passage from life to death. From the burials of biblical heroes to prehistoric mummification, we delve into the origins of these sacred customs.

programme.title: Phantom Wreck

programme.title: Bear Down

programme.title: King Of The Mountain
programme.desc: On his 80th birthday Tom builds a teepee, while Nancy plans him a surprise party. Jake runs a mountain lion off the highway during calving season. Paul hauls his trapping shed up a narrow mountain.

programme.title: Barber Shop, Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: George meets Olivia and Rollo who are converting an old barbershop into a beautiful new home.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee (S11)
programme.desc: It's week 3, and we're celebrating design icons: Diane von Furstenberg, Vivienne Westwood and Versace.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars (S2)
programme.desc: It's all about innovation as Gordon Ramsay invites the teams to create a cocktail in a can, then launch it at Henley Royal Regatta. Who will make the grade?

programme.title: Decorating Donkey
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: Cake Relocate
programme.desc: Cake is tired of living in the fridge, so Sarah & Duck help him think about where else he would like to stay.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: Portrait
programme.desc: Stanley is called to pose as a model for the town's art club, but he's got lots of jobs on and won't stay still. Peggy and the gang must come up with a way to keep Stanley still.

programme.title: I will get a Football for my Birthday.
programme.desc: Parties, presents, and lots of cake! The animals chat about everything they love about birthdays!

programme.title: It's time for a spring clear out
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a spring clear out, but when Gran Gran wants to clear out her old jumper, JoJo is distraught - she loves that snuggly jumper!

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: The Fashion Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!

programme.title: What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Mountain Gorillas, The Democratic Republic of the Congo
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters and also from a sneezy Grandmaster Glitch's germs.

programme.title: Parsnip
programme.desc: Parsnip performs a jaw dropping escape that will leave even Houdini speechless.

programme.title: Spinach
programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: Moustache Mystery
programme.desc: Broccoli is horrified when someone paints moustaches on photographs of her friends!

programme.title: Waltzing Potato
programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Day Trip
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Cheese
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cheese' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is full of cheese - yellow cheese, triangle cheese, some sandwich cheese and a squeaky cheese.

programme.title: Messy Cake-Off
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: Watch the Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Pan-American Highway, Panama
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.title: Shaun
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Dance Mode
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Andy and the Grizzly Bear Cubs
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen & Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Along the way, Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip with its mother to catch salmon.

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: The Memory Badge
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: The Leshan Giant Buddha, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.title: The Great Pacific Garbage Patch
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: All Tracks Lead to Rome
programme.desc: Thomas is working on the Italian Railway, keen to prove to his new friend Gina that he is an expert in all things Italian.

programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Pan-American Highway, Panama
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.title: Shaun
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Dance Mode
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Andy and the Grizzly Bear Cubs
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen & Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Along the way, Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip with its mother to catch salmon.

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: The Memory Badge
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: The Leshan Giant Buddha, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.title: The Great Pacific Garbage Patch
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: All Tracks Lead to Rome
programme.desc: Thomas is working on the Italian Railway, keen to prove to his new friend Gina that he is an expert in all things Italian.

programme.title: Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: I Like Jellyfish, Because they Jiggle
programme.desc: The funny little animals talk us through all their favourite creatures.

programme.title: It's time to find a butterfly
programme.desc: JoJo searches for a butterfly to complete her nature tick-book. She learns that all butterflies start life as furry little caterpillars.

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: The Tooth Brushing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath.

programme.title: The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetter or No Jetter?
programme.desc: Foz starts to think his team doesn't need him anymore. Can Tala convince him he still has what it takes to be a Go Jetter, or will he follow Glitch down a different path?

programme.title: Lychee

programme.title: Cheese

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 白范与都智翰一起在现场寻找永洙死亡背后的真相，在那里他们发现了一条关键线索。

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: 你不容错过的韩国综艺节目! 每集里, 主持群将与来宾们接受不同的挑战, 并淘汰对方, 成为最后的优胜者。

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tergila Gila Sama Kamu Core
programme.desc: Rizki (Elryan Carlen) loses his memory and is rescued by Silvi (Larasati Nugroho). Silvi’s brother convinces her to marry Rizki, renaming him 'Dul.' When Rizki’s brother, Beno, finally finds him working as a humble farmer, another accident restores Rizki’s memory-leading him to realize he truly wants to marry Silvi after all.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Supir dan Majikan Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Ilen (Jennifer Eve) feels like she’s living a Cinderella story with her prince charming. However, her fairy tale turns into a nightmare when she discovers that her driver, Mario (Adhitya Alkatiri), is actually her ex-boyfriend, Bagas (Andrew Andika), in disguise.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gak Pengen Jadi Ipar Pengennya Jadi Pacar
programme.desc: Wini (Indah Nicole) accidentally crashes her bike into Dito (Hardi Fadhillah), causing an 'injury' to his sensitive area. Feeling responsible for his future, Wini tries to match her sister with Dito. However, she soon realizes her own heart objects, she is secretly falling for the man she’s trying to marry off.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN

programme.title: Senyuman Penyeimbang Tatanan Dunia
programme.desc: Kinan (Indah Nicole), a doctor who moved to a village to escape her stepfamily, is pickpocketed at the market. The thief hands the loot to Arman (Kevin Hillers), causing a massive fight between Kinan and Arman. They meet again when Kinan saves Arman’s younger sibling, forcing them to see each other in a new light.

programme.title: Maling Hati Malah Kena Ulti
programme.desc: Fafa (Djihan Ranti) is rude to a driver named Trisno (Ridho Illahi) after an accident. She later discovers Trisno is the man who tends to her mother’s goats. Fafa flatly rejects an arranged marriage with him, insulting him for his 'goat-like' scent, leaving the hardworking Trisno heartbroken.

programme.title: Uber Cup QF 4 (C2)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Problem Child in House
programme.desc: This is a great "knowledge talk show" where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number; attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic "Noonas" (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally-driven romances in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: In this bold yet heartbreaking story, a mother and daughter-in-law meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. She doesn't trust him much at first, but as time passes by, she accepts him as family. This new father is always on her side. He loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: A Graceful Liar

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: #FresnoGirl
programme.desc: Sam and Cat promise to buy a girl they babysit a Fresno Girl doll if she raises her grades. When she does, Sam and Cat are financially strained by the markups and add-ons that come with it. Goomer loses his lucky t-shirt.

programme.title: The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: The Rejects
programme.desc: When Leo, Mikey, and Raph are captured by the mad scientist Jordan Perry and his Monster Mutanimals, Donnie must stop a mutant invasion on Staten Island and save everyone from the terrifying creation known as Mutant Omega!

programme.title: Ma and Pa's Big Hurrah / Yellow Pavement
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise. // You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.title: The Flower Plot / SpongeBob on Parade
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner. // The Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Bad Eggs / Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

programme.title: Robo Stomp / Wood You?
programme.desc: Bester's record attempt is at risk when Best steals her thunder by being the robot instead of learning the robot. // On a search for the first woodpecker in spring, Best finds that he's in very much in tune with nature after all.

programme.title: Movie Stars / Dr. Smart Science
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere. // With Sandy's guidance, Patrick hosts a science show.

programme.title: Chum Bucket List / Big Baby Patrick
programme.desc: After Patrick eats life-threatening chum, SpongeBob helps him check off his bucket list. // Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

programme.title: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: Snooze You Lose
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob & Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition!

programme.title: The Parent Zap
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Alien Zoo
programme.desc: When Danger Force becomes the newest exhibit at an Alien Zoo, Miles must find a way to break them out before they become alien dinner.

programme.title: Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry's got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: Left in the Dark / Get the Message
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: Heavy Meddle / Making the Case
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: How the Best Was Won
programme.desc: Ever wonder what it's like to grow up in a big family? Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household, especially as the only boy with ten sisters!

programme.title: Biscuit Ballyhoo / Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs joins the ring and turns it into a competition. // When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.title: Wiener Takes All / Stuck in an Elevator
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's. // Squidward gets trapped in an elevator with SpongeBob and Patrick on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

programme.title: Dome Alone
programme.desc: While stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and recruits Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Patty-Poo / Swaptoberfest
programme.desc: Patrick spawns an adorable mini-Patrick who quickly becomes the star of the show (until he outgrows the role). // The Star family celebrates the Klopnodian holiday Swaptoberfest by swapping identities with each other.

programme.title: The Dated Game
programme.desc: GrandPat competes for Granny Tentacles' love on a dating game show.

programme.title: Scales of Justice / Crimes of Fashion
programme.desc: When Lana learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction she springs into action. // When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.

programme.title: Absent Minded / Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job. But can he give up the perks that come along with it? // When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Sitting Bull / The Spies Who Love Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive. // Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

programme.title: Ship Wreckers / Writer's Retreat
programme.desc: Leni and Luna accidentally wreck Gramps boat when their small viewing party gets out of control. // Lucy struggles to come with ideas when she's given the opportunity to write an original story for the Royal Wood's Gazette.

programme.title: Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: Father, Son, And Furniture Store
programme.desc: Will tries to connect with Jack at the oddball store Mike A's. Everything goes awry and they must fight to save their lives!

programme.title: Snooze You Lose / Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob & Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition! // Mr. Krabs & his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: Mind the Gap
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Power Play with the Casagrandes / Room for Improvement with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage. // Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it a secret from the other tenants.

programme.title: Roll Model with the Casagrandes / No Show with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero. // Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: Love is in the Lair
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: Budget Cuts
programme.desc: When the Vice Mayor cuts Captain Man and Kid Danger's budget to build a high speed railway in Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must figure out creative ways to save money.

programme.title: iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Ask Away-Way with Lay Lay
programme.desc: As class president, Sadie gets to host the announcements, and Lay Lay comes on the show as the advice expert. But, students start to get upset when the advice the girls give cause unnecessary fallout.

programme.title: Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: One of the Boys / A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: Delivery of Doom / My Father the Boat
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less. // When Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside of Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: All Out of Idea Bricks / A Fool Schooled
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina follow a runaway idea brick into Randomland. // After discovering that Patrick never finished behavioral training, the family home-schools him.

programme.title: X Marks the Pot
programme.desc: A classic villain returns to his former lair, only to find the Star Family inhabiting it.

programme.title: Pop Pop the Question / Lynn and Order
programme.desc: When the kids discover Myrtle has a shady past, they try to expose her before Pop Pop proposes. // Lynn and Liam butt heads when they're forced to partner up as the middle school hall monitors.

programme.title: Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: Sold! / Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward's delight. // When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters.

programme.title: Pop Pop the Question / Lynn and Order
programme.desc: When the kids discover Myrtle has a shady past, they try to expose her before Pop Pop proposes. // Lynn and Liam butt heads when they're forced to partner up as the middle school hall monitors.

programme.title: Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: Ask Away-Way with Lay Lay
programme.desc: As class president, Sadie gets to host the announcements, and Lay Lay comes on the show as the advice expert. But, students start to get upset when the advice the girls give cause unnecessary fallout.

programme.title: The Summer I Turned Giddy
programme.desc: Upset that Phoebe has a new partner, Max decides to partner with his friend Gideon. But things backfire when Max tries to turn Gideon into a supersized superhero. Chloe's friends pretend to be wealthy so they can bond with her new crush.

programme.title: Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte, and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: Brawl In The Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: Uncle Hambone
programme.desc: When Chapa's little sister needs her help during a city-wide blackout, the rest of Danger Force cross the line as they try to pull her back to power up the Man's Nest and help them win a contest.

programme.title: iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he's being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie's mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: #StuckInABox
programme.desc: Sam and Cat have tickets to Mystic Mountain theme park, but their plans are disrupted when Cat gets trapped inside one of Dice's magic tricks, and the gang has to find a way to get her out.

programme.title: Rise of the Night Ninja
programme.desc: When Leo accidentally saves a subway station full of innocent people, he's inspired to take on a life of crime-fighting vigilantism as the Night Ninja! But has he met his match with the villainous La Fleur and her gang of dognappers?

programme.title: The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: Delivery to Monster Island / Ride Patrick Ride
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters. // SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: Hot Crossed Nuts / Sir Urchin and Snail Fail
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab. // SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Chess-a-pult / Smart & Smarter
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. // Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: Taken to the Cleaners / Mugshot
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on an undercover mission to find out why items of laundry are going missing at the Dry Cleaners. // In an unfortunate case of mistaken identity, Best has been mistaken for the notorious jewel thief, Jimmy Muggins.

programme.title: Too Many Patricks / Much Tofu About Nothing
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: At Home, On the Lam / Pick Patrick's Path
programme.desc: Bunny must punish Patrick for chocolate-flavored crimes. // The Lawnies vote for what Patrick does next.

programme.title: Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: Let's Go to the Movies!
programme.desc: ShoutOut has a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to sell a movie to Hollywood bigshot Deuce Van Nuys, but when her mind goes blank under the pressure, the rest of Danger Force pitch in and share their own epic--and epically bad--movie ideas.

programme.title: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Henry and Ray have to deal with an especially annoying new villain, the Spoiler. Piper is pushed to her limits as she tries to join a popular Captain Man fan club.

programme.title: Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

programme.title: Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: Driver's Dread
programme.desc: Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: Squidness Protection / Dome Alone
programme.desc: Squidward's amazing new life in witness protection is threatened after SpongeBob and Patrick discover his whereabouts. // While stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and recruits Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: Wary Gary / Pinned
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet. // SpongeBob become desperate when he accidentally gets pinned under his exercise equipment and must wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Wary Gary
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Patrickle Jokes / Pat Roast
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina go undercover to investigate a corrupt novelty product factory. // The Patrick Show presents the "Roast of Patrick Star".

programme.title: Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: The Ice Cream Man and Ice Cream King team up to capture a mysterious ice cream eating beast.

programme.title: The Taunting Hour / Musical Chairs
programme.desc: After Lincoln tries to help Lynn get over a heckler at her soccer game, the Louds realize they all have critics. // Lincoln convinces his teacher, Mr. Bolhofner, to join the Doo-Dads in order to get a better seat in class.

programme.title: Jeers for Fears / Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears. // Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loudest Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Faced with spending Thanksgiving apart, Lori and Bobby try to bring their crazy families together for the first time.

programme.title: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up. // When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: LAD
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob's Place / Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place. // When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: The newly reformed "Clean Bubble" takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Face the Music with the Casagrandes / Pranks for the Memories with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform for Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. // Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: Store Wars with the Casagrandes / Lucha Fever with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy new grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. // Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lubra Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: Space Invader
programme.desc: After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: Toon in for Danger
programme.desc: When Henry and Ray get a copy of the new Kid Danger and Captain Man cartoon and see that it's horrible, they must hurry to fix the cartoon before the big premiere party.

programme.title: iSaw Him First
programme.desc: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them. This turns out to be more difficult than they imagined and soon their friendship is tested as they compete for his attention.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Sorori-Tay-Tay
programme.desc: Trish's college sorority is reuniting for a mother-daughter step contest, and Lay Lay agrees to take over for Sadie, who is locked in a battle with Marky over their personal space.

programme.title: Funny Business / Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Price of Admission / One Flu Over the Loud House
programme.desc: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

programme.title: The Real Woori World / The Collector

programme.title: Patrick's Alley
programme.desc: The Patrick Show rebrands for a younger audience.

programme.title: Fashion No Show / Doom Service

programme.title: Trio Baperan Kena Polusi Cinta
programme.desc: Three young men named Malik, Jajang, and Jarwo are hired to work at a company owned by a beautiful woman named Dina. All three seem to be smitten with their boss's charm. However, Malik, who is known as a playboy, secretly hurts Dina's younger sister, Monic. Dina, as the older sister, does not remain silent. She secretly takes revenge by making the three men fall in love with her and then ignoring their love.

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Desperate for a solution, Zulfa and Kevin turn to a matchmaking agency, only to be betrayed by their respective partners. Since they both need a significant other to complete a mission, the agency suggests they team up and fake a relationship. However, the game changes when Kevin meets Zulfa’s mother, who happens to be a close friend of his own parents. Now, their mothers are joining forces to force them into a real marriage.

Retta's mother (Miranty Dewi), who found out about this, immediately arranged for Rio and Retta to get married.

programme.title: Antara Aku, Kamu, Dan Lutung Kasarung

Lily's arrogant and jealous siblings tried to seize the fortune by various means, including hiring thugs and even attempting to kill Lily. programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明与叶凌霜共同经历绿龙事件后，关系变得更加微妙。在圣寿节这天，叶凌霜拉彧修明出宫看花灯，两人的关系得到进一步升温。另一方面，彧修明任命界诸婴为越州大都护，引发樊如晦和左近天的不满，左近天甚至派兵埋伏，意图杀死界诸婴。面对困境，界诸婴决定通过不受左近天控制的夜沼前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊被董博利诱，想透过宝鐷建设的工程生意，暗中与「第一钢材」达成台底交易。慧云遭基俊冷落，终日赌钱来排解苦闷，一次因无法偿还赌债而把限量版手袋作抵押。陈幸芳要求媳妇慧云带同该手袋出席时装秀，慧云只能以高仿品充当真品，却惹假货疑云；满月使计替慧云解围，取得其信任。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 慧云出席名媛界的慈善会议，听到公关林美琪嘲笑她，使计辞退美琪，改聘满月当公关。成风查到第一钢材有问题，奉世祺之命接近基俊。满月担心成风会阻挠基俊与第一钢材签约，故意公开哲贤病重消息，再使计令成风失约于基俊。成风始料不及，想细问满月，满月却忽然胃痛被送院，漫星、曦晨赶到医院见成风甚为关心满月……哲贤身体状态转差，满月怀疑有人暗中下毒… …永源向基俊求财，却被侮辱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 冷天曦发现彧修明对叶凌霜有特殊情感，叶凌霜因被误解与翼无忧有染而被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。同时，左近天因抗旨并试图杀害界诸婴和七海伶，引发彧修明的愤怒。彧修明采取措施逼迫左近天，并处理了与左近天有牵连的樊家。另一方面，叶凌霜为了解开封印，在得到彧修明的许可后闭关静修三天。

programme.title: 长辈
programme.desc: 家境富裕的大财主立带男为填房，为了避免那不可靠的侄子夺取家产，他在病重前立下遗嘱，更要求带男将遗嘱交给省城的另一侄子。当带男这个年轻长辈遇上侄子及他的儿子时，更闹出一连串的笑话。惠英红更藉此夺第一届香港电影金像奖影后。

programme.title: 乾隆皇与三姑娘
programme.desc: 乾隆皇爱慕苏州名妓三姑娘，为了朝夕幽会，竟然在青楼挖了一条地下通道直达紫禁城。青楼内外，乾隆神出鬼没，吓破臣下的胆子。乾隆在民间行侠仗义，更在赌坊大破赌局。

programme.title: 赌王大骗局
programme.desc: 沙氏家族的赌术、千术已达出神入化的境界，在赌坛更是无人不知，无人不晓，而沙通更是青出于蓝而胜于蓝，在赌坛素有"赌王"之誉，甚少遇到对手。然而，沙通亦背负一段由赌而来的深仇，其师遭牌霸彭天石诬告贩毒，被判刑十多年。沙通矢志为师报仇，欲以"老千千老千， 骗子骗骗子"的手段对付彭天石...

programme.title: 梁山伯与祝英台
programme.desc: 祝英台既为女儿身，却穿男儿装上学堂，与同窗梁山伯结下生死之爱。山伯得悉真相后，前往祝家求亲，岂料英台已被许配他人，二人被迫分开。山伯伤心欲绝，一病不起。英台惊闻噩耗，哭坟跳进墓里殉情。

programme.title: 铁观音
programme.desc: 女警探艾丝化身成走私犯秃子的情妇，与魔女党的程铁虎认识。艾丝潜入魔女党总部，取得首领黑寡妇信任。不料秃子越狱，艾丝身份被揭露，铁虎冒死将艾丝救出，艾丝遥见黑寡妇率众跳上快艇逃走，艾丝埋下的定时炸弹爆炸，快艇炸成粉碎...

programme.title: 乾隆皇奇遇记
programme.desc: 乾隆皇帝微服出巡，希望藉此了解百姓的生活需要，但却碰上连串的奇遇，乾隆更被衙差关进牢狱，差点要被斩首...最后又有谁可拯救皇帝出困境？

programme.title: 凤飞飞
programme.desc: 凤飞飞为报姐仇，发现凶手竟为未来夫婿金连白，不知所措。而杀姐夫之凶手萧豹与梁霸为除后患，与金夫人联手对付飞飞，欲灭绝凤家。飞飞怒不可遏，合父母之力将恶贼击毙。

programme.title: 钓金龟
programme.desc: 三个歌舞女郎张萍、叶凤、林芝兰，随歌舞团去台北表演，歌舞团经纪陈彼德原与叶拍拖，但陈移情于胡闻莺。张萍出发前被男友抛弃，叶凤要从莺手上追回陈彼德的爱，林芝兰为却一心不嫁富豪誓不回。引出乌龙百出的爱情喜剧......

programme.title: 倚天屠龙记大结局
programme.desc: 剧情主线在于张无忌、周芷若与赵明的三角恋，以及倚天剑屠龙刀秘密的最后答案。

programme.title: 王昭君
programme.desc: 王昭君拒绝贿赂画师，于是一直被画师画丑致未被皇帝看上。但皇帝初遇昭君后，惊为天人，即选中她。画师被逐后，为报复而设计将昭君与匈奴可汗和亲。皇帝因拒绝婚事即引来两国争战，以致王昭君最后为了平息战乱不得不牺牲自己。

programme.title: 大海盗
programme.desc: 海盗张保仔洗劫一艘外国商船后，发现海盗船身出现裂痕。于是他上岸寻找材料修船，竟发现清朝贪官正在欺压贫苦农民。本性善良的张保仔，决心要锄强扶弱，最终更成为著名的大海盗。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明与叶凌霜共同经历绿龙事件后，关系变得更加微妙。在圣寿节这天，叶凌霜拉彧修明出宫看花灯，两人的关系得到进一步升温。另一方面，彧修明任命界诸婴为越州大都护，引发樊如晦和左近天的不满，左近天甚至派兵埋伏，意图杀死界诸婴。面对困境，界诸婴决定通过不受左近天控制的夜沼前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊被董博利诱，想透过宝鐷建设的工程生意，暗中与「第一钢材」达成台底交易。慧云遭基俊冷落，终日赌钱来排解苦闷，一次因无法偿还赌债而把限量版手袋作抵押。陈幸芳要求媳妇慧云带同该手袋出席时装秀，慧云只能以高仿品充当真品，却惹假货疑云；满月使计替慧云解围，取得其信任。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶和界诸婴为了躲避左近天的追杀，选择带领族人穿越危险的夜沼前往越州。在途中，他们遇到了困难，但最终通过与土伯的交易成功穿越。然而，到达营地时发现夜北族人被左近天抓走，七海伶和界诸婴为救族人分别被擒。另一方面，叶凌霜因与翼无忧私下见面被樊如晦设计陷害，被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 慧云出席名媛界的慈善会议，听到公关林美琪嘲笑她，使计辞退美琪，改聘满月当公关。成风查到第一钢材有问题，奉世祺之命接近基俊。满月担心成风会阻挠基俊与第一钢材签约，故意公开哲贤病重消息，再使计令成风失约于基俊。成风始料不及，想细问满月，满月却忽然胃痛被送院，漫星、曦晨赶到医院见成风甚为关心满月……哲贤身体状态转差，满月怀疑有人暗中下毒… …永源向基俊求财，却被侮辱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 冷天曦发现彧修明对叶凌霜有特殊情感，叶凌霜因被误解与翼无忧有染而被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。同时，左近天因抗旨并试图杀害界诸婴和七海伶，引发彧修明的愤怒。彧修明采取措施逼迫左近天，并处理了与左近天有牵连的樊家。另一方面，叶凌霜为了解开封印，在得到彧修明的许可后闭关静修三天。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Day 6 Session 2 Tie 2: Chinese Taipei vs Denmark (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Alula Tour Final H/Ls
