programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) SF 1
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: The Case Of The Delayed Repairs
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns.

programme.title: Why Vulture Is Bald
programme.desc: You see there was time when Vulture was not bald. Oh no, Vulture's head was covered in a beautiful crown of golden plumage! Vain Vulture never shut up about her golden feathers and was obsessed about making them ‘as golden as the sun!'. One day Vulture decides to fly up to the sun, but her precious feathers get burnt! Vulture decides to sooth her smoking feathers with golden honey which she steals from the bees. The bees are not pleased and Vulture sticks her head down Aardvark's burrow.

programme.title: Why Giraffe Has A Long Neck
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Giraffe didn't have a long neck. Her neck was all short and stumpy and she was a very delicate eater. All the food in Tinga Tinga seemed to make her tummy go funny. Then one day Lion suggests she try some honey. With the Bees permission, Giraffe tries to lick the honey… but it is deep, deep inside the tree.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Space Suit
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Greendale, and Ted Glen has invited the kids to his workshop to meet his friend, space expert Professor Farrow. Julian's excited but so is Pat, who has always yearned to be an astronaut. He's even more thrilled when he finds that his special delivery is a space suit - an extra surprise for the kids. When his van breaks down in a snowy lane, he finds an ingenious solution - only to suffer a puncture - and Ted is unable to help...

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Stormy Birthday
programme.desc: It's Chris Beacon's birthday and he's looking forward to spending the day onshore and having a party at the village hall. Pat's SDS mission is to pick up all the presents from everyone who won't be able to be at the party later.

programme.title: Home Is Where The Hatch Is
programme.desc: Breeze and Roary swap places for the day (and night). Roary soon discovers the beach is no place for a racing car to live, while Breeze misses the freedom of the beach.

programme.title: Putting On A Show
programme.desc: The cars are all gleaming for this evening's race. Roary gets bored and heads out onto the track - with disastrous consequences. Will the cars be ready in time for the big show?

programme.title: Motor Mouth
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Dancing Queen
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: The Case Of The Big Pile of Cabbages
programme.desc: When Noddy comes to give Smartysaurus an invitation to Queen Sparklewings's picnic, there's a big pile of cabbages blocking her front door. Noddy investigates: who left the big pile of cabbages there and why? And will he be able to solve the case in time for the Royal Picnic?

programme.title: The Case Of The Queen's Special Gift
programme.desc: The Knights have been away travelling around Toyland and they each return with a special gift for the Queen. But the last Knight to arrive back was so busy having fun that he forgot to bring back a present for the Queen. Noddy assures him the Queen won't mind but the poor Knight is adamant he must give her something. Noddy sets out to help him find the perfect gift.

programme.title: The Case of the Pirates' Missing Treasure
programme.desc: When the Pockets find an old treasure map, the Pirates are delighted. They race off to find the treasure. Only to come back rather confused. They found a treasure chest but it ran away! Noddy investigates: "What's happened to the Pirates' treasure?"

programme.title: The Case Of The Frozen Toys
programme.desc: Noddy and Big Ears come to Fable Forest to see the Queen Sparklewings's magic crystal collection. But when they arrive at the Fairy Castle, they find all the toys there frozen like statues. What's going on. It's up to Noddy to investigate and help his friends return to their normal selves.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: King Burple
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Charged Up
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: You (Don't) Snooze, You Lose / Save The Squasher
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Flying High / Nest Sweet Nest
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: The Case Of The Big Pile of Cabbages
programme.desc: When Noddy comes to give Smartysaurus an invitation to Queen Sparklewings's picnic, there's a big pile of cabbages blocking her front door. Noddy investigates: who left the big pile of cabbages there and why? And will he be able to solve the case in time for the Royal Picnic?

programme.title: The Case Of The Queen's Special Gift
programme.desc: The Knights have been away travelling around Toyland and they each return with a special gift for the Queen. But the last Knight to arrive back was so busy having fun that he forgot to bring back a present for the Queen. Noddy assures him the Queen won't mind but the poor Knight is adamant he must give her something. Noddy sets out to help him find the perfect gift.

programme.title: The Case of the Pirates' Missing Treasure
programme.desc: When the Pockets find an old treasure map, the Pirates are delighted. They race off to find the treasure. Only to come back rather confused. They found a treasure chest but it ran away! Noddy investigates: "What's happened to the Pirates' treasure?"

programme.title: The Case Of The Frozen Toys
programme.desc: Noddy and Big Ears come to Fable Forest to see the Queen Sparklewings's magic crystal collection. But when they arrive at the Fairy Castle, they find all the toys there frozen like statues. What's going on. It's up to Noddy to investigate and help his friends return to their normal selves.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Salty and Sweet / Cruz Blues
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Pet Sitters / Narwhalicorn Day
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: New Hat, New Tag! / Furry Tail Ending
programme.desc: When Tag worries that she's no longer a "Go" dog, Lady Lydia helps her find a new persona by helping Tag try on a bunch of different hats. Luckily, when a runaway puppy needs to be wrangled, and only the speedy Tag can catch him, Tag realizes she was a Go dog all along. \ Sergeant Pooch reads Scooch, Tag and Kit a story book during their sleepover. But when the last pages are missing, the three kids work together to make up their own ending to the story.

programme.title: Bigpaw, Big Problems / Captain Scooch and Scally-Tag
programme.desc: Tag, Scooch and Kit think they found the perfect story for their newspaper: Bigpaw is in Pawston! But when they find out that Frank and Beans were lying to the town, they seek to uncover the truth and reveal it to everyone. \ When Sam Whippet sets up a pirate-themed race for the Race Cadets, pirate-loving Scooch takes on the role of captain. Tag struggles to take orders as first mate while helping Scooch navigate maritime obstacles and avoid the fearsome pirates.

programme.title: Ottos
programme.desc: When a meteor crashes into the Wrenchtools' home, the Dinotrux take them to safe ground; little do they know D-Structs is planning a giant attack.

programme.title: Lucky and the No-Good Outlaw Butch Lepray
programme.desc: Lucky gets into trouble when the circus picks up a stranded woman who isn't what she seems

programme.title: Bait With Destiny / Sappy Together
programme.desc: Eep gets jealous when Thunk is invited to join the hunters/Grug and Gran must work together after getting stuck to each other with sticky tree sap

programme.title: Scare Tactics / Disturbiahhh!
programme.desc: Grug has Thunk use "scare tactics" to get the Valley to defend against the Broods/Eep thinks Snoot is holding Ahhh! Valleyites captive in his cave

programme.title: Have Dragon Will Travel Pt 2
programme.desc: Heather joins the Dragon Riders, but it's not an easy alliance, especially when Hiccup uncovers a shocking secret about her true identity.

programme.title: The Next Big Sting
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders rescue a wounded Speed Stinger and take it back to Dragon's Edge, unaware of the dangers that follow.

programme.title: The Pinging
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Mister Mastodon
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Wrinkles & Stickles
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Bossa Nova
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: The Museum Job
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Abysmal Altercation of the Abominable Altitooth
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Bout of the Beastly Barfilisk
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: The Bedouin Shield
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: The Eye of the Sahara
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: RoboCleve
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: Follow The Leader
programme.desc: When Fishlegs discovers a hidden civilization of Albino Night Terrors beneath Dragon's Edge, he must craft an escape plan after they attack the Riders.

programme.title: Turn And Burn
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Buffalord Soldier
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Grand Theft Otto
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: Kanjigaargh
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 2
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: The Liar and The Thief
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.desc: In northern Guangdong, majestic mountain ranges are home to a dazzling array of wildlife; Silver Pheasants, Chinese Pangolins, Black Kites, Chinese Giant Salamanders, and an entirely new species of cave gecko.

programme.title: Tanzania - Mount Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: Many call it the 'Roof of Africa'. Mount Kilimanjaro is often considered the easiest of the big Seven. But with a 50% success rate, this journey to the summit is not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Tio Tesoro's Treasure / The Great Key Mystery
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Map help Tio Tesoro find his treasure trackers and become a treasure map again. // Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: Ratoncito Perez / The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: Pups Save the Penguins / Pups Save a Dolphin Pup
programme.desc: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat, so he calls Ryder and the PAW Patrol to help investigate. // Dolphin Pup accidentally swims into a shallow water stream! Now it's up to Ryder and PAW Patrol to get her back into the Bay.

programme.title: Pups Save the Space Alien / Pups Save a Flying Frog
programme.desc: An Alien Spaceship crash lands at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol will help out the stranded little extra-terrestrial to get back to his home planet! // Marshall's new pet frog, Smiley, is going to be in a jumping contest!

programme.title: Let Justice Be done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: Side-Swiped / Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: Abra-Ka-Pickle!
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: The Yucky Ducky
programme.desc: When the Yucky Ducky covers Axle City in icky, sticky grossigoo, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to stop her machine and save the world from being grossified... forever!

programme.title: The Pillow Pirate
programme.desc: When a burgling buccaneer steals every pillow in Axle City, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to save bedtime! Using his new Special Mission Modes and the power of addition, can Blaze solve this pillow problem?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 34. Friday's game sees Sunderland host Nottingham Forest, Arsenal welcome Newcastle, Liverpool take on Crystal Palace, and Manchester United close out the round against Brentford.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Gabby Agbonlahor sits down for 1-to-11 to reveal his ultimate Aston Villa lineup, made up of the teammates he played alongside. A true one-club man, Gabby reflects on his journey from academy prospect to first-team star, sharing stories of the players who made the biggest impact during his time at Villa Park. His Villa XI is full of character, quality, and claret-and-blue pride.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career - from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex's Ferguson's Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 6
programme.desc: 12 days of braving inhospitable weather conditions and treacherous terrain leads Mohit to the hallowed Mount Kailash._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Bryggen
programme.desc: A world heritage site Bergen in Norway is famous for the row of wooden houses on one side of the old wharf called Bryggen. More than 900 years old these houses have seen history unfold.

programme.title: Floating Market
programme.desc: Unveil the hidden treasures of Thailand's time-honored Klong Lat Phli: a floating legacy.

programme.title: Nagaland, Mokokchung
programme.desc: Rohan discovers the rock and gospel music craze in Nagaland when he attends a music festival in Mokokchung village.

programme.title: Thailand 5 Must Do's For Kids
programme.desc: Keeping kids entertained is not a herculean task in Thailand, so let them live their childhood fantasies as we unroll a freewheeling adventure in "The Land of Smiles."

programme.title: Lotus Temple
programme.desc: Encircled by prim lush greens, stands a concrete flower half open called the Bahá'i House of Worship, more commonly known as the Lotus Temple.

programme.title: Agra, India
programme.desc: Kirsty comes to Agra, the erstwhile capital of Mughal kings, where she gets a chance to experience the splendor associated with the Mughal dynasty.

programme.title: Must Visit, Budapest
programme.desc: We have the lowdown on the must-hit spots of Budapest that will make your rendezvous with the Hungarian capital unforgettable.

programme.title: Mauritius 2
programme.desc: Join Sakshi as she ziplines, enjoying the stunning landscapes and followed by a submarine ride. Further explores the capital, Port Louis she ends the day after exploring the Vanilla Crocodile Park.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 7
programme.desc: From magnificent monasteries sprawled over craggy hills to the soul-cleansing Mansarovar lake, Mohit has a tryst with Tibet’s deep spiritual heritage.

programme.title: San Augustin Church
programme.desc: Heritage brings you the oldest stone church (built in 1589) in Philippines, the San Augustine church which is a respite from the chaos of Manila.

programme.title: Rizal Park
programme.desc: Also known as Luneta Park, This landmark has been part of historic episodes, the most significant being the execution of the Philippine national leader Jose Rizal.

programme.title: Nagaland, Mon
programme.desc: Rohan visits a village in Nagaland where the country border between India and Myanmar, passes through the village chief’s house.

programme.title: Jaipur
programme.desc: A quick escape to Jaipur introduces Asmita to the stark contrast in the old and new sides of Rajasthan’s capital city.

programme.title: Turrialba
programme.desc: In the Turrialba region, Genevieve finds herself in awe of the highest volcano in Costa Rica, its active presence quickening her pulse.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 1
programme.desc: While planning to go on the Kailash-Mansarovar Trek, Mohit realizes that the preparation for it is a journey in itself.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi explores the magnificent monuments and architecturally striking attractions of Helsinki.

programme.title: Chhattisgarh 1
programme.desc: Aradhana embarks on an adventure to uncover the hidden wonders of a land steeped in spirituality and untamed wilderness: Chhattisgarh!

programme.title: Hej Stockholm
programme.desc: Where cobblestone alleys meet disco lights - Robbie lands in Stockholm, a city that grooves to its own beat. The adventure kicks off in style.

programme.title: Bikaner
programme.desc: From miniature paintings on palace walls to elaborate havelis, Asmita finds out that Bikaner is an art lover’s paradise.

programme.title: Manuel Antonio
programme.desc: In the Manuel Antonio region of Costa Rica, Genevieve’s quest for wildlife leads her from rainforest to ocean.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 2
programme.desc: On the way to Narayan Ashram in Uttarakhand, from where the trek to Mount Kailash can begin, Mohit encounters a landslide.

programme.title: Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to the Arctic Circle, where she meets Santa Claus in his office. She also tries midnight sun floating.

programme.title: Chhattisgarh 2
programme.desc: As Aradhana’s journey in Chhattisgarh continues, she is stunned to discover the wealth of natural beauty that the state has to offer.

programme.title: Kungsberget Rush
programme.desc: One rookie, one snowstorm, one giant slope - Robbie swaps city life for ski life in the wild winter playground of Kungsberget.

programme.title: Budapest 2
programme.desc: Sabrina Chakici gets up, close and personal with Budapest, the capital of Hungary, and she gets to know about its history and character.

programme.title: Corcovado
programme.desc: Guided by an irresistible call to adventure, young American traveler, Genevieve Sexton ventures deep into Costa Rica.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 3
programme.desc: Mohit realizes just what it takes to descend 4444 steps and walk along a furious river to reach the base camp on the trek to Mount Kailash.

programme.title: Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: In Rovaniemi, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits a husky farm, tries fishing with a local and participates in a curious Finnish tradition.

programme.title: Chhattisgarh 3
programme.desc: On the last leg of her journey in Chhattisgarh, Aradhana uncovers the hidden world of the state’s artistic legacy.

programme.title: Gotland Tales
programme.desc: Robbie steps into a fairytale on the island of Gotland - medieval walls, mysterious lagoons, and rugged beauty collide in this windswept wonderland.

programme.title: Kamalaya, Thailand
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a variety of detoxifying spa treatments at the Kamalaya Wellness Resort in Koh Samui, Thailand.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Rohit and Manasi are on the Maharajas’ Express. Their first destination is Udaipur, where they bump into an old friend who knows all their secrets.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 4
programme.desc: On his journey to Mount Kailash, Mohit finds out the role of the Indo-Tibetan Border Police in ensuring the safety of pilgrims.

programme.title: Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi bakes cookies with Santa’s helpers in Elves village, in Levi. She also rides river rapids on a car inner tube..

programme.title: Nagaland, Kohima
programme.desc: Originally called ‘Kehwira’, the capital of Nagaland, Kohima was the site of one of the bloodiest battles of World War II.

programme.title: Gothenburg Drift
programme.desc: Crayfish safaris, floating saunas, and fika breaks galore - Robbie slows it down on Sweden’s effortlessly cool west coast.

programme.title: Nagaland, Kohnoma & Wokha
programme.desc: On a bike trip across the Nagaland, Rohan gets a chance to meet some fearless and simple Naga tribes.

programme.title: Mount Kailash 5
programme.desc: After crossing over to Tibet, Mohit visits a sacred site for Hindus and Jains, and catches his first glimpse of Mount Kailash.

programme.title: Evason Mai'n, Jordan
programme.desc: At Evason Ma’In resort in Jordan, Jamie Srubis tries spa treatments, which use the healing qualities of the nearby Hammamat Ma’In hot springs.

programme.title: Trollhättan Trails
programme.desc: From epic waterfalls to hidden street art and one last party in Gothenburg - Robbie’s Swedish story ends with a cinematic splash.

programme.title: Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Through Finnish activities such as foraging and reindeer herding, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi learns about Sisu - the Finnish secret to happiness.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Nagaland, Kohnoma & Wokha
programme.desc: On a bike trip across the Nagaland, Rohan gets a chance to meet some fearless and simple Naga tribes.

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 叶问
programme.desc: 咏春大师叶问的功夫在中国各地备受推崇。正值日本侵华，叶问被迫离开家园并要找工作养家糊口。他唯有无奈地以咏春拳教导学生自卫训练，以赚取生活费用。

programme.title: 纸人回魂
programme.desc: 一位记者调查二十年前纸人回魂案时，听到三个关于恐怖纸人的故事。故事起源于乔府大小姐乔媛媛枉死后，管家请纸扎匠为小姐做了纸人陪葬。纸人被点眼睛后，大小姐得以借纸人回魂复仇，更接二连三引发连串与纸人有关的骇人听闻事件。

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: 除恶: 飞车党
programme.desc: 本片由真实事件改编，刑警林岩成立专队对付佛山飞车抢夺案的飞车大盗及幕后犯罪集团。过程中，林岩怀孕的妻子被飞车大盗撞到，继而揭发他们犯罪背后的复仇计划...

programme.title: 求爱敢死队
programme.desc: 失恋的王晶认识了电台节目主持曾志伟。志伟自诩情场杀手向王晶提供追求秘诀，但当其本身周旋于妻子与情人的关系当中，却不知如何是好...

programme.title: 鬼马飞人
programme.desc: 阿B为一名中学的体育教师，其执教之学校篮、足球队成绩甚差，学校下令他务必赢得校际比赛冠军，否则将撤换教练。阿B因头痛，误服同事研制之神药，变成超人，令球队屡次创造奇迹...

programme.title: 醉拳
programme.desc: 年轻气盛的黄飞鸿因招惹地方恶霸之子，被父亲送去跟随「醉拳大师」苏乞儿受训一年。当父亲揭发恶霸欲将国有矿产卖给日本人的阴谋后，顿成刺杀目标。为救父并阻止交易，飞鸿施展自创的「醉拳」，击败众杀手。

programme.title: 少年陈真之乱世英雄
programme.desc: 电影讲述清末上海的小人物陈真，在经历苦难及面对无数挑战后，蜕变成长为民族英雄的故事。

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: 赤脚小子
programme.desc: 穷乡青年关丰曜，终日赤着双脚，以背人过河为活。关父临终前，嘱其出城投靠段青云；段骤见故人之子，留下关在布店当小工。关与私塾女教师华小莲交心，却遭莲父白眼；关为求出人头地，竟往投靠土霸喀和布，结果连累莲父与段相继被喀暗算身亡。关得知真相，惜为时已晚，追悔莫及，决与喀拼过死活...

programme.title: 雪儿
programme.desc: 舞蹈教师雪儿年轻貌美，被富商戴家乐力追，但她却喜欢青年艺术家阿化，并与他同居。戴家乐心有不甘，设计让雪儿对他改观，更利诱阿化离开雪儿！

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: Uber Cup QF 2 (C2)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Day 13 Afternoon Session: SF 1
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.
